steps.instruction: Crack eggs into a cold, non-stick pan with butter. No whisking yet.
steps.instruction_tl: Ibasag ang mga itlog sa malamig na kawali na may mantikilya. Huwag munang haluin.
steps.instruction_il: Ibuska dagiti itlog iti nalamiis a paryok nga addaan mantikilya. Saan pay nga kiburen.

steps.instruction: Turn heat to medium. Stir gently and constantly with a spatula.
steps.instruction_tl: Buksan ang katamtamang apoy. Haluin nang mahinahon at tuloy-tuloy gamit ang spatula.
steps.instruction_il: Pataken ti apuy iti tengnga. Kiburen iti naalumanay ken agtultuloy babaen ti spatula.

steps.instruction: Take the pan off the heat every 30 seconds to stop it cooking too fast. Put back on. Repeat.
steps.instruction_tl: Alisin ang kawali sa apoy tuwing 30 segundo para hindi agad maluto. Ibalik. Ulitin.
steps.instruction_il: Ikkaten ti paryok iti apuy kada 30 segundo tapno saan a mapartak a maluto. Isubli. Ulitan.

steps.instruction: Toast the bread while eggs cook.
steps.instruction_tl: Ihurno ang tinapay habang nagluluto ang itlog.
steps.instruction_il: Itostar ti tinapay bayat nga agluto ti itlog.

steps.instruction: When eggs are just set but still soft, remove from heat. Season with salt and pepper. Sprinkle chives. Serve on toast.
steps.instruction_tl: Kapag nakakapal na pero malambot pa, alisin sa apoy. Timplahan ng asin at paminta. Budburan ng chives. Ihain sa toast.
steps.instruction_il: No napalukmegen ngem nalukneng pay laeng, ikkaten iti apuy. Timplaan iti asin ken paminta. Iwarasen ti chives. Idasar iti toast.

steps.instruction: Whisk flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt in a bowl.
steps.instruction_tl: Paghaluin ang harina, baking powder, asukal, at asin sa mangkok.
steps.instruction_il: Paglalaoken ti arina, baking powder, asukar, ken asin iti malukong.

steps.instruction: In another bowl, whisk milk, eggs, and melted butter.
steps.instruction_tl: Sa ibang mangkok, paghaluin ang gatas, itlog, at tinunaw na mantikilya.
steps.instruction_il: Iti sabali a malukong, paglalaoken ti gatas, itlog, ken naurnong nga mantikilya.

steps.instruction: Pour wet into dry. Mix just until combined — lumps are fine. Rest 10 mins.
steps.instruction_tl: Ibuhos ang basa sa tuyo. Haluin lamang hanggang magsanib — pwede na kahit may bukol. Pahingahin ng 10 minuto.
steps.instruction_il: Ibukbok ti nabasa iti namaga. Kiburen laeng agingga a maikayon — mabalin nga adda bukol. Paginanaen iti 10 minuto.

steps.instruction: Heat a non-stick pan on medium-low. Ladle batter in circles. Cook until bubbles form and edges set, 2-3 mins.
steps.instruction_tl: Painitin ang non-stick na kawali sa katamtamang-baba. Lagyan ng batter na bilog. Lutuin hanggang lumitaw ang bula, 2-3 minuto.
steps.instruction_il: Pataken ti non-stick a paryok iti tengnga-baba. Sandukan iti batter a nabilog. Lutuen agingga nga agbussog, 2-3 minuto.

steps.instruction: Flip once. Cook 1-2 more minutes until golden. Serve with butter and maple syrup.
steps.instruction_tl: Balikin isang beses. Lutuin ng 1-2 minuto pa hanggang maging ginintuan. Ihain na may mantikilya at maple syrup.
steps.instruction_il: Balikan maminsan. Lutuen pay iti 1-2 minuto agingga nga nabalitok. Idasar nga addaan mantikilya ken maple syrup.

steps.instruction: Dice potatoes small. Fry in oil with diced onion, 10 mins, until golden. Salt.
steps.instruction_tl: Hiwain ng maliit ang patatas. Iprito sa langis kasama ng hiniwang sibuyas, 10 minuto, hanggang ginintuan. Asinan.
steps.instruction_il: Tadtaden a babassit ti patatas. Iprito iti lana a kadua ti natadtad a sibuyas, 10 minuto, agingga nga nabalitok. Asinan.

steps.instruction: Fry bacon separately until crisp. Chop.
steps.instruction_tl: Iprito ang bacon hanggang maging malutong. Hiwain.
steps.instruction_il: Iprito ti bacon agingga nga nakrokro. Tadtaden.

steps.instruction: Scramble eggs soft in a buttered pan.
steps.instruction_tl: Iskamble nang malambot ang itlog sa kawaling may mantikilya.
steps.instruction_il: Iskamble iti nalukneng ti itlog iti paryok nga addaan mantikilya.

steps.instruction: Warm tortillas in a dry pan, 20 seconds each side.
steps.instruction_tl: Painitin ang tortillas sa tuyong kawali, 20 segundo bawat gilid.
steps.instruction_il: Pataken ti tortillas iti namaga a paryok, 20 segundo kada suli.

steps.instruction: Pile potato, eggs, bacon, cheese, salsa on each tortilla. Fold sides in, roll tight. Toast seam-side down 1 min.
steps.instruction_tl: Ilagay ang patatas, itlog, bacon, keso, salsa sa bawat tortilla. Itupi ang gilid, irolyo ng mahigpit. Iprito ang tahi pababa ng 1 minuto.
steps.instruction_il: Ikabil ti patatas, itlog, bacon, keso, salsa iti tunggal tortilla. Iluktot dagiti sikigan, ibalkot a naigut. Itostar ti dait nga pababa iti 1 minuto.

steps.instruction: Boil a big pot of salted water. Cook spaghetti per packet time minus 1 min.
steps.instruction_tl: Pakuluan ang malaking palayok ng inasnang tubig. Lutuin ang spaghetti ayon sa pakete nang bawas ng 1 minuto.
steps.instruction_il: Pagburekan ti dakkel a paryok ti naasinan a danum. Lutuen ti spaghetti a sigun iti paket bawasan iti 1 minuto.

steps.instruction: Toast pine nuts dry in a pan, 2 mins, until fragrant. Cool.
steps.instruction_tl: Iprito ang pine nuts sa tuyong kawali, 2 minuto, hanggang mabango. Palamigin.
steps.instruction_il: Itostar ti pine nuts iti namaga a paryok, 2 minuto, agingga nga nabanglo. Palamiisen.

steps.instruction: Blend basil, pine nuts, garlic, parmesan, olive oil, salt until smooth.
steps.instruction_tl: I-blend ang basil, pine nuts, bawang, parmesan, olive oil, asin hanggang pino.
steps.instruction_il: I-blend ti basil, pine nuts, bawang, parmesan, olive oil, asin agingga a napino.

steps.instruction: Halve cherry tomatoes.
steps.instruction_tl: Hatiin ang cherry tomatoes.
steps.instruction_il: Paggudu-guduen ti cherry tomatoes.

steps.instruction: Reserve 100ml pasta water. Drain pasta. Toss with pesto, adding pasta water until creamy. Fold in tomatoes. Serve with more parmesan.
steps.instruction_tl: Magtabi ng 100ml tubig ng pasta. Salain ang pasta. Haluin sa pesto, dagdagan ng tubig hanggang maging creamy. Idagdag ang kamatis. Ihain na may karagdagang parmesan.
steps.instruction_il: Ibilin ti 100ml a danum ti pasta. Itikaen ti pasta. Kiburen iti pesto, nayunan ti danum agingga a creamy. Inayunan ti kamatis. Idasar nga addaan nayon a parmesan.

steps.instruction: Cube chicken. Mix with yogurt, tikka paste, lemon juice, salt. Marinate 2 hours (or overnight).
steps.instruction_tl: Hiwain ng kubo ang manok. Ihalo sa yogurt, tikka paste, katas ng lemon, asin. I-marinate ng 2 oras (o magdamag).
steps.instruction_il: Tadtaden a kubo ti manok. Ilaok iti yogurt, tikka paste, tubbog ti lemon, asin. I-marinate iti 2 oras (wenno nagpatpatnag).

steps.instruction: Heat grill pan or skillet very hot. Cook chicken in batches, 3-4 mins per side, until charred and cooked.
steps.instruction_tl: Painitin ang grill pan nang husto. Iprito ang manok ng paunti-unti, 3-4 minuto bawat gilid, hanggang sunog-sunog at luto.
steps.instruction_il: Pataken ti grill pan iti napudut unay. Iprito ti manok iti sangsangkabassit, 3-4 minuto iti tunggal suli, agingga nga napupuoran ken naluto.

steps.instruction: Thinly slice cucumber and red onion. Pick mint leaves.
steps.instruction_tl: Hiwain nang manipis ang pipino at pulang sibuyas. Pitasin ang dahon ng mint.
steps.instruction_il: Ngagiwen a nanipis ti kulentro ken nalabaga a sibuyas. Pulien dagiti bulong ti mint.

steps.instruction: Warm flatbreads in a dry pan.
steps.instruction_tl: Painitin ang flatbread sa tuyong kawali.
steps.instruction_il: Pataken ti flatbread iti namaga a paryok.

steps.instruction: Fill flatbreads with chicken, cucumber, onion, mint, and a spoon of yogurt. Roll up.
steps.instruction_tl: Lagyan ang flatbread ng manok, pipino, sibuyas, mint, at isang kutsarang yogurt. Irolyo.
steps.instruction_il: Kargaan ti flatbread iti manok, kulentro, sibuyas, mint, ken maysa a kutsarada ti yogurt. Ibalkot.

steps.instruction: Break up the cold rice with your hands so no clumps.
steps.instruction_tl: Durugin ang malamig na kanin gamit ang kamay para walang bukol.
steps.instruction_il: Rumekrekan ti nalamiis a kanen babaen ti ima tapno awan ti bukol.

steps.instruction: Finely chop garlic, ginger, and whites of spring onions. Slice greens for garnish.
steps.instruction_tl: Tadtarin ng pino ang bawang, luya, at puting bahagi ng dahon ng sibuyas. Hiwain ang berdeng bahagi para palamuti.
steps.instruction_il: Tadtaden a napino ti bawang, laya, ken napuraw a paset ti sibuyas a bulong. Ngagiwen ti nalangto a paset para iti pangpalamuti.

steps.instruction: Heat wok very hot with vegetable oil. Scramble eggs quickly, remove.
steps.instruction_tl: Painitin ang wok nang husto na may mantika. Iskamble ang itlog nang mabilis, alisin.
steps.instruction_il: Pataken ti wok iti napudut unay nga addaan lana. Iskamble iti napartak ti itlog, ikkaten.

steps.instruction: Add more oil, fry garlic, ginger, onion whites 30 seconds. Add peas 1 min.
steps.instruction_tl: Dagdagan ng mantika, igisa ang bawang, luya, puting sibuyas ng 30 segundo. Idagdag ang peas ng 1 minuto.
steps.instruction_il: Nayunan ti lana, igisa ti bawang, laya, puraw a sibuyas iti 30 segundo. Inayunan ti peas iti 1 minuto.

steps.instruction: Add rice, press into wok, let crisp 1 min. Stir-fry 3 mins. Add soy and sesame oil. Fold eggs back in. Top with green onions.
steps.instruction_tl: Idagdag ang kanin, idiin sa wok, hayaang magkrispi ng 1 minuto. Igisa ng 3 minuto. Lagyan ng toyo at sesame oil. Ibalik ang itlog. Budburan ng dahon ng sibuyas.
steps.instruction_il: Inayunan ti kanen, iparek iti wok, palubusan a makrokro iti 1 minuto. Igisa iti 3 minuto. Nayunan iti toyo ken sesame oil. Isubli ti itlog. Iwarasan iti bulong ti sibuyas.

steps.instruction: Soup: sweat chopped onion and garlic in olive oil 5 mins. Add canned tomatoes. Simmer 15 mins.
steps.instruction_tl: Sabaw: igisa ang sibuyas at bawang sa olive oil ng 5 minuto. Idagdag ang de-latang kamatis. Pakuluan ng 15 minuto.
steps.instruction_il: Sabaw: igisa ti sibuyas ken bawang iti olive oil iti 5 minuto. Inayunan ti kamatis a de-lata. Pagburekan iti 15 minuto.

steps.instruction: Blend soup smooth. Stir in cream. Salt to taste.
steps.instruction_tl: I-blend ang sabaw hanggang pino. Lagyan ng cream. Timplahan ng asin.
steps.instruction_il: I-blend ti sabaw agingga a napino. Inayunan ti cream. Timplaan iti asin.

steps.instruction: Butter one side of each bread slice.
steps.instruction_tl: Pahiran ng mantikilya ang isang gilid ng bawat tinapay.
steps.instruction_il: Sapsapuan iti mantikilya ti maysa a suli ti tinapay.

steps.instruction: Assemble sandwiches: bread (butter out), cheddar, gruyère, bread. Grill medium-low 3 mins per side until golden and melted.
steps.instruction_tl: Buuin ang sandwich: tinapay (mantika paluwas), cheddar, gruyère, tinapay. Iprito sa katamtamang-baba na apoy 3 minuto bawat gilid hanggang ginintuan at natunaw.
steps.instruction_il: Agbangon iti sandwich: tinapay (mantika paruar), cheddar, gruyère, tinapay. Iprito iti tengnga-baba nga apuy iti 3 minuto iti tunggal suli agingga a nabalitok ken naurnong.

steps.instruction: Slice in half. Top soup with torn basil. Serve hot.
steps.instruction_tl: Hatiin. Lagyan ng pinunit na basil ang sabaw. Ihain habang mainit.
steps.instruction_il: Paggudu-guduen. Karaman ti nagisiwsiw a basil iti sabaw. Idasar iti napudut.

steps.instruction: Cube chicken. Toss with yogurt, half the garam masala, half the ginger-garlic paste, salt. Rest 15 mins.
steps.instruction_tl: Hiwain ng kubo ang manok. Ihalo sa yogurt, kalahating garam masala, kalahating ginger-garlic paste, asin. Pahingahin ng 15 minuto.
steps.instruction_il: Tadtaden a kubo ti manok. Ilaok iti yogurt, kagudua a garam masala, kagudua a ginger-garlic paste, asin. Paginanaen iti 15 minuto.

steps.instruction: Rinse rice. Cook per packet (usually 1:1.5 rice:water, 15 mins covered, low).
steps.instruction_tl: Hugasan ang kanin. Lutuin ayon sa pakete (karaniwan 1:1.5, 15 minuto, may takip, mahinang apoy).
steps.instruction_il: Buggoan ti kanen. Lutuen sigun iti paket (gagangay 1:1.5, 15 minuto, addaan takkup, nakapuy nga apuy).

steps.instruction: Sear chicken in butter until browned, 6-8 mins. Remove.
steps.instruction_tl: Iprito ang manok sa mantikilya hanggang kayumanggi, 6-8 minuto. Alisin.
steps.instruction_il: Iprito ti manok iti mantikilya agingga a kayumanggi, 6-8 minuto. Ikkaten.

steps.instruction: Same pan: sauté onion, remaining ginger-garlic paste 3 mins. Add remaining garam masala, passata. Simmer 10 mins.
steps.instruction_tl: Sa parehong kawali: igisa ang sibuyas, natitirang ginger-garlic paste ng 3 minuto. Idagdag ang natitirang garam masala, passata. Pakuluan ng 10 minuto.
steps.instruction_il: Iti isu met laeng a paryok: igisa ti sibuyas, nabati a ginger-garlic paste iti 3 minuto. Inayunan ti nabati a garam masala, passata. Pagburekan iti 10 minuto.

steps.instruction: Stir in cream. Return chicken. Simmer 5 mins. Adjust salt.
steps.instruction_tl: Lagyan ng cream. Ibalik ang manok. Pakuluan ng 5 minuto. Ayusin ang asin.
steps.instruction_il: Inayunan ti cream. Isubli ti manok. Pagburekan iti 5 minuto. Urnosen ti asin.

steps.instruction: Serve over rice. Top with chopped coriander.
steps.instruction_tl: Ihain sa kanin. Budburan ng tinadtad na wansoy.
steps.instruction_il: Idasar iti kanen. Iwarasan iti natadtad a kulantro.

steps.instruction: Form beef into 8 loose balls (75g each). Don't pack tight.
steps.instruction_tl: Hubugin ang karne sa 8 maluwag na bola (75g bawat isa). Huwag siksikin.
steps.instruction_il: Aramiden ti karne iti 8 nalukneng a bola (75g iti tunggal maysa). Saan a ilinsadan.

steps.instruction: Mix mayo, ketchup, mustard for sauce. Thinly slice onion and pickles. Butter and toast bun insides.
steps.instruction_tl: Ihalo ang mayo, ketsap, mustasa para sa sarsa. Hiwain nang manipis ang sibuyas at pickles. Pahiran ng mantikilya at ihurno ang loob ng buns.
steps.instruction_il: Ilaok ti mayo, ketsap, mustasa para iti sarsa. Ngagiwen a nanipis ti sibuyas ken pickles. Sapsapuan iti mantikilya ken itostar ti uneg ti buns.

steps.instruction: Heat heavy skillet or griddle SCREAMING hot. Place a ball on, press down HARD with a spatula for 15 seconds. Salt.
steps.instruction_tl: Painitin ang mabigat na kawali nang napakainit. Ilagay ang bola, diinin NG MALAKAS gamit ang spatula ng 15 segundo. Asinan.
steps.instruction_il: Pataken ti nadagsen a paryok iti napudut unay. Ikabil ti bola, iparek iti NAPIGSA babaen ti spatula iti 15 segundo. Asinan.

steps.instruction: Cook 1-2 mins until deep crust. Flip, top with cheese, cook 1 min more.
steps.instruction_tl: Lutuin ng 1-2 minuto hanggang malalim ang crust. Balikin, lagyan ng keso, lutuin pa ng 1 minuto.
steps.instruction_il: Lutuen iti 1-2 minuto agingga a nauneg ti crust. Balikan, karaman iti keso, lutuen pay iti 1 minuto.

steps.instruction: Stack 2 patties per bun. Top with sauce, onion, pickles, top bun.
steps.instruction_tl: Isalansan ang 2 patties bawat bun. Lagyan ng sarsa, sibuyas, pickles, itaas na bun.
steps.instruction_il: Pagsalunganen ti 2 a patties iti tunggal bun. Karaman ti sarsa, sibuyas, pickles, akin-rabaw a bun.

steps.instruction: Boil eggs 6.5 mins for jammy yolks. Ice bath. Peel, halve.
steps.instruction_tl: Pakuluan ang itlog ng 6.5 minuto para malambot ang pula. Ilusong sa malamig na tubig. Balatan, hatiin.
steps.instruction_il: Pagburekan ti itlog iti 6.5 minuto tapno nalukneng ti nalabaga. Isawsaw iti nalamiis a danum. Ukisan, paggudu-guduen.

steps.instruction: Sear pork belly slices in a dry pan until crisp, 3 mins per side. Set aside.
steps.instruction_tl: Iprito ang pork belly sa tuyong kawali hanggang malutong, 3 minuto bawat gilid. Itabi.
steps.instruction_il: Iprito ti pork belly iti namaga a paryok agingga a nakrokro, 3 minuto iti tunggal suli. Ibilin.

steps.instruction: In a pot, sauté grated garlic and ginger in sesame oil 30 seconds. Add stock. Bring to simmer.
steps.instruction_tl: Sa palayok, igisa ang kinayod na bawang at luya sa sesame oil ng 30 segundo. Idagdag ang stock. Pakuluan.
steps.instruction_il: Iti paryok, igisa ti naigud a bawang ken laya iti sesame oil iti 30 segundo. Inayunan ti stock. Pagburekan.

steps.instruction: Whisk miso and soy into a ladle of stock until smooth. Stir back into pot.
steps.instruction_tl: Paghaluin ang miso at toyo sa isang sandok ng stock hanggang pino. Ibalik sa palayok.
steps.instruction_il: Paglalaoken ti miso ken toyo iti maysa a sandok ti stock agingga a napino. Isubli iti paryok.

steps.instruction: Cook noodles per packet. Drain. Divide into bowls.
steps.instruction_tl: Lutuin ang noodles ayon sa pakete. Salain. Hatiin sa mga mangkok.
steps.instruction_il: Lutuen ti noodles a sigun iti paket. Itikaen. Paggudu-guduen iti malukong.

steps.instruction: Ladle broth over noodles. Top with pork, egg halves, sliced spring onion, a sheet of nori.
steps.instruction_tl: Sandukan ng sabaw ang noodles. Lagyan ng baboy, kalahating itlog, hiniwang dahon ng sibuyas, nori.
steps.instruction_il: Sandukan ti sabaw iti noodles. Karaman ti baboy, naggudu-gudua nga itlog, naggiwat a sibuyas, nori.

name: Crispy Chicken Thighs & Roasted Veg
name_tl: Malutong na Chicken Thighs at Inihaw na Gulay
name_il: Nakrokro a Chicken Thighs ken Natuno a Nateng

steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 220°C. Pat chicken skin very dry. Salt skin generously.
steps.instruction_tl: Painitin ang oven sa 220°C. Patuyuing mabuti ang balat ng manok. Asinan ang balat nang sagana.
steps.instruction_il: Pataken ti pugon iti 220°C. Punasan a namaga ti kudil ti manok. Asinan ti kudil iti nagadu.

steps.instruction: Halve potatoes, chunk carrots, break broccoli into florets. Toss with oil, salt, pepper on a sheet pan.
steps.instruction_tl: Hatiin ang patatas, hiwain ang karot, hatiin ang broccoli. Ihalo sa mantika, asin, paminta sa bandehado.
steps.instruction_il: Paggudu-guduen ti patatas, tadtaden ti karot, tangalen ti broccoli. Ilaok iti lana, asin, paminta iti bandehado.

steps.instruction: Heat oven-safe skillet on stove. Place chicken skin-down in cold pan, turn to medium. Render 10 mins without moving, until skin is deep gold.
steps.instruction_tl: Painitin ang kawaling pwede sa oven. Ilagay ang manok na balat paibaba sa malamig na kawali, buksan sa katamtamang apoy. Lutuin ng 10 minuto na hindi ginagalaw, hanggang ginintuan ang balat.
steps.instruction_il: Pataken ti paryok a mabalin iti pugon. Ikabil ti manok a kudil-pababa iti nalamiis a paryok, pataken iti tengnga. Lutuen iti 10 minuto nga awan ti panangikibin, agingga a nabalitok ti kudil.

steps.instruction: Flip chicken. Add thyme and smashed garlic cloves to skillet. Transfer skillet + sheet pan to oven. Roast 25 mins.
steps.instruction_tl: Balikin ang manok. Lagyan ng thyme at dinurog na bawang. Ilipat ang kawali at bandehado sa oven. Lutuin ng 25 minuto.
steps.instruction_il: Balikan ti manok. Nayunan ti thyme ken narumek a bawang. Iyakar ti paryok ken bandehado iti pugon. Lutuen iti 25 minuto.

steps.instruction: Rest chicken 5 mins. Serve with veg, spoon pan juices over.
steps.instruction_tl: Pahingahin ang manok ng 5 minuto. Ihain kasama ang gulay, lagyan ng sarsa mula sa kawali.
steps.instruction_il: Paginanaen ti manok iti 5 minuto. Idasar a kadua ti nateng, karaman ti sarsa manipud iti paryok.

steps.instruction: Bring steak to room temp 20 mins. Pat dry. Salt and pepper heavily on both sides.
steps.instruction_tl: Hayaang mainit-init ang steak ng 20 minuto. Patuyuin. Asinan at pamintahan ng husto sa magkabilang gilid.
steps.instruction_il: Palubusan nga mapudot ti steak iti 20 minuto. Punasan a namaga. Asinan ken pamintaan iti nagadu iti agsumbangir.

steps.instruction: Heat heavy pan or grill very hot. Sear steak 3-4 mins each side for medium. Rest 10 mins.
steps.instruction_tl: Painitin ang mabigat na kawali nang husto. Iprito ang steak ng 3-4 minuto bawat gilid para medium. Pahingahin ng 10 minuto.
steps.instruction_il: Pataken ti nadagsen a paryok iti napudut unay. Iprito ti steak iti 3-4 minuto iti tunggal suli para iti medium. Paginanaen iti 10 minuto.

steps.instruction: Whisk olive oil, lemon juice, dijon, pinch of salt for dressing.
steps.instruction_tl: Paghaluin ang olive oil, katas ng lemon, dijon, pinch ng asin para sa dressing.
steps.instruction_il: Paglalaoken ti olive oil, tubbog ti lemon, dijon, bassit nga asin para iti dressing.

steps.instruction: Chop veg. Toss leaves, tomatoes, cucumber, red onion with dressing. Crumble feta on top.
steps.instruction_tl: Hiwain ang gulay. Ihalo ang dahon, kamatis, pipino, pulang sibuyas sa dressing. Budburan ng feta.
steps.instruction_il: Tadtaden ti nateng. Ilaok ti bulong, kamatis, kulentro, nalabaga a sibuyas iti dressing. Iwarasan iti feta.

steps.instruction: Slice steak across the grain, thin. Serve over salad.
steps.instruction_tl: Hiwain ang steak laban sa hibla, manipis. Ihain sa ibabaw ng salad.
steps.instruction_il: Ngagiwen ti steak a mabussag iti hibla, nanipis. Idasar iti rabaw ti salad.

steps.instruction: Finely dice onion, carrot, celery. Mince garlic. Dice pancetta.
steps.instruction_tl: Tadtarin ng pino ang sibuyas, karot, celery. Tadtarin ang bawang. Hiwain ang pancetta.
steps.instruction_il: Tadtaden a napino ti sibuyas, karot, celery. Tadtaden ti bawang. Tadtaden ti pancetta.

steps.instruction: Render pancetta in olive oil, 5 mins. Add onion, carrot, celery, garlic. Cook 8 mins, softened.
steps.instruction_tl: Iprito ang pancetta sa olive oil, 5 minuto. Idagdag ang sibuyas, karot, celery, bawang. Lutuin ng 8 minuto, malambot.
steps.instruction_il: Iprito ti pancetta iti olive oil, 5 minuto. Inayunan ti sibuyas, karot, celery, bawang. Lutuen iti 8 minuto, nalukneng.

steps.instruction: Turn heat up, add beef. Brown well, breaking up, 8 mins. Salt.
steps.instruction_tl: Lakasan ang apoy, idagdag ang karne. Lutuin hanggang kayumanggi, durugin, 8 minuto. Asinan.
steps.instruction_il: Pataken ti apuy, inayunan ti karne. Lutuen agingga a kayumanggi, rumekrekan, 8 minuto. Asinan.

steps.instruction: Stir in tomato paste 1 min. Deglaze with wine, reduce 3 mins. Add canned tomatoes and milk. Simmer low 40 mins, stirring now and then.
steps.instruction_tl: Idagdag ang tomato paste, haluin 1 minuto. Buhusan ng wine, kuluin 3 minuto. Idagdag ang kamatis at gatas. Pakuluan sa mahinang apoy ng 40 minuto, haluin paminsan-minsan.
steps.instruction_il: Inayunan ti tomato paste, kiburen iti 1 minuto. Ikamot ti arak, pagburekan iti 3 minuto. Inayunan ti kamatis ken gatas. Pagburekan iti nakapuy nga apuy iti 40 minuto, kiburen no sanggawag-sanggawag.

steps.instruction: Cook spaghetti per packet. Drain, reserve 100ml pasta water. Toss pasta in sauce with a splash of pasta water. Serve with parmesan.
steps.instruction_tl: Lutuin ang spaghetti ayon sa pakete. Salain, magtabi ng 100ml tubig. Ihalo ang pasta sa sarsa may kaunting tubig. Ihain na may parmesan.
steps.instruction_il: Lutuen ti spaghetti sigun iti paket. Itikaen, ibilin ti 100ml a danum. Ilaok ti pasta iti sarsa nga addaan bassit a danum. Idasar nga addaan parmesan.

steps.instruction: Preheat oven 200°C. Pat chicken bone-dry. Season cavity with salt and pepper. Stuff with halved lemon, half the garlic, half the thyme.
steps.instruction_tl: Painitin ang oven sa 200°C. Patuyuing mabuti ang manok. Timplahan ang loob ng asin at paminta. Lagyan ng hinating lemon, kalahating bawang, kalahating thyme.
steps.instruction_il: Pataken ti pugon iti 200°C. Punasan a namaga ti manok. Timplaan ti uneg iti asin ken paminta. Kargaan ti naggudu-guduan a lemon, kagudua a bawang, kagudua a thyme.

steps.instruction: Rub softened butter all over skin. Salt generously all over. Tie legs with string.
steps.instruction_tl: Pahiran ng malambot na mantikilya ang balat. Asinan nang sagana. Talian ang paa.
steps.instruction_il: Sapsapuan iti nalukneng a mantikilya ti kudil. Asinan iti nagadu. Galutan dagiti saka.

steps.instruction: Halve potatoes. Toss in a roasting tray with olive oil, remaining garlic and thyme, salt, pepper. Place chicken on top.
steps.instruction_tl: Hatiin ang patatas. Ihalo sa bandehado na may olive oil, natitirang bawang at thyme, asin, paminta. Ilagay ang manok sa ibabaw.
steps.instruction_il: Paggudu-guduen ti patatas. Ilaok iti bandehado nga addaan olive oil, nabati a bawang ken thyme, asin, paminta. Ikabil ti manok iti rabaw.

steps.instruction: Roast 1 hour 15 mins until thigh juice runs clear. Baste once at 45 mins.
steps.instruction_tl: Ihurno ng 1 oras 15 minuto hanggang malinaw ang katas ng hita. Buhusan ng sarsa isang beses sa 45 minuto.
steps.instruction_il: Itunno iti 1 oras 15 minuto agingga a nalitnaw ti tubbog ti luppo. Karaman iti sarsa maminsan iti 45 minuto.

steps.instruction: Rest chicken 15 mins before carving. Serve with potatoes and pan juices.
steps.instruction_tl: Pahingahin ang manok ng 15 minuto bago hiwain. Ihain kasama ang patatas at sarsa.
steps.instruction_il: Paginanaen ti manok iti 15 minuto sakbay nga iwa-iwaen. Idasar a kadua ti patatas ken sarsa.

steps.instruction: Season ribs with salt and pepper. Sear in hot olive oil until browned on all sides, 3-4 mins per side.
steps.instruction_tl: Timplahan ng asin at paminta ang ribs. Iprito sa mainit na langis hanggang makulay, 3-4 minuto bawat gilid.
steps.instruction_il: Timplaan ti ribs iti asin ken paminta. Iprito iti napudut a lana agingga a nakayumanggi, 3-4 minuto iti tunggal suli.

steps.instruction: In the same pot, soften onion and garlic over medium heat, 5 mins.
steps.instruction_tl: Sa parehong palayok, igisa ang sibuyas at bawang sa katamtamang apoy, 5 minuto.
steps.instruction_il: Iti isu met laeng a paryok, lutuen ti sibuyas ken bawang iti tengnga nga apuy, 5 minuto.

steps.instruction: Add stock, balsamic, crushed tomatoes and rosemary. Stir. Nestle ribs back in.
steps.instruction_tl: Idagdag ang stock, balsamic, kamatis at rosemary. Haluin. Ibalik ang ribs.
steps.instruction_il: Inayunan ti stock, balsamic, kamatis ken rosemary. Kiburen. Isubli ti ribs.

steps.instruction: Cover and cook on lowest heat 2.5 hours until meat falls off the bone.
steps.instruction_tl: Takpan at lutuin sa pinakamahinang apoy ng 2.5 oras hanggang matanggal ang karne sa buto.
steps.instruction_il: Taktakan ken lutuen iti kapupuyotan nga apuy iti 2.5 oras agingga a makauksot ti karne iti tulang.

steps.instruction: Boil potatoes 20 mins, drain, mash with butter and cream. Salt.
steps.instruction_tl: Pakuluan ang patatas ng 20 minuto, salain, durugin kasama ang mantikilya at cream. Asinan.
steps.instruction_il: Pagburekan ti patatas iti 20 minuto, itikaen, rumekrekan a kadua ti mantikilya ken cream. Asinan.

steps.instruction: Remove rosemary. Taste sauce, adjust salt. Serve ribs over mash, sauce spooned over.
steps.instruction_tl: Alisin ang rosemary. Tikman ang sarsa, ayusin ang asin. Ihain ang ribs sa ibabaw ng mashed potato, lagyan ng sarsa.
steps.instruction_il: Ikkaten ti rosemary. Raman ti sarsa, urnosen ti asin. Idasar ti ribs iti rabaw ti mashed potato, karaman iti sarsa.

steps.instruction: Pat fish dry. Rub with oil, cumin, paprika, salt.
steps.instruction_tl: Patuyuin ang isda. Pahiran ng langis, cumin, paprika, asin.
steps.instruction_il: Punasan a namaga ti ikan. Sapsapuan iti lana, cumin, paprika, asin.

steps.instruction: Shred cabbage thinly. Chop coriander. Thinly slice red onion. Juice 1 lime over cabbage with pinch of salt.
steps.instruction_tl: Hiwain nang manipis ang repolyo. Tadtarin ang wansoy. Hiwain nang manipis ang pulang sibuyas. Pigain ang 1 lime sa repolyo na may asin.
steps.instruction_il: Ngagiwen a nanipis ti repolyo. Tadtaden ti kulantro. Ngagiwen a nanipis ti nalabaga a sibuyas. Tubbogan ti 1 lime iti repolyo a nayonan ti bassit nga asin.

steps.instruction: Mix mayo, chipotle, juice of half a lime for crema.
steps.instruction_tl: Ihalo ang mayo, chipotle, katas ng kalahating lime para sa crema.
steps.instruction_il: Ilaok ti mayo, chipotle, tubbog ti kagudua a lime para iti crema.

steps.instruction: Pan-fry fish in olive oil, 3-4 mins per side until flaky. Flake into chunks.
steps.instruction_tl: Iprito ang isda sa olive oil, 3-4 minuto bawat gilid hanggang malambot. Durugin sa tipak.
steps.instruction_il: Iprito ti ikan iti olive oil, 3-4 minuto iti tunggal suli agingga a nalukneng. Rumekrekan iti tinatangal.

steps.instruction: Warm tortillas in a dry pan. Fill with fish, cabbage slaw, crema, coriander, onion. Serve with lime wedges.
steps.instruction_tl: Painitin ang tortillas sa tuyong kawali. Lagyan ng isda, repolyo, crema, wansoy, sibuyas. Ihain na may hinating lime.
steps.instruction_il: Pataken ti tortillas iti namaga a paryok. Kargaan ti ikan, repolyo, crema, kulantro, sibuyas. Idasar a kadua ti naggudu-gudua a lime.

steps.instruction: Pat pork very dry. Score the skin in a cross-hatch (don't cut into meat). Rub all over with salt, paprika, crushed fennel, brown sugar. Refrigerate uncovered 2+ hours.
steps.instruction_tl: Patuyuing mabuti ang baboy. Hiwain ang balat sa cross-hatch (huwag abutin ang karne). Pahiran ng asin, paprika, durog na fennel, brown sugar. Ilagay sa ref na walang takip ng 2+ oras.
steps.instruction_il: Punasan a namaga ti baboy. Iwa-iwaen ti kudil iti cross-hatch (saan a dumanon iti karne). Sapsapuan iti asin, paprika, narumek a fennel, brown sugar. Ikabil iti ref nga awan ti takkup iti 2+ oras.

steps.instruction: Preheat oven 230°C. Slice onions thick, smash garlic. Line a deep tray with them and rosemary. Pour in cider. Set pork on top.
steps.instruction_tl: Painitin ang oven sa 230°C. Hiwain nang makapal ang sibuyas, durugin ang bawang. Ilagay sa malalim na bandehado kasama ang rosemary. Buhusan ng cider. Ilagay ang baboy sa ibabaw.
steps.instruction_il: Pataken ti pugon iti 230°C. Ngagiwen a napuskol ti sibuyas, rumekrekan ti bawang. Ikabil iti nauneg a bandehado a kadua ti rosemary. Ikamot ti cider. Ikabil ti baboy iti rabaw.

steps.instruction: Roast uncovered 30 mins. Turn oven DOWN to 140°C. Cover tightly with foil. Roast 3.5 hours.
steps.instruction_tl: Ihurno na walang takip ng 30 minuto. Bawasan ang apoy sa 140°C. Takpan ng foil nang masikip. Ihurno ng 3.5 oras.
steps.instruction_il: Itunno nga awan ti takkup iti 30 minuto. Bassitan ti apuy iti 140°C. Taktakan iti foil a naigut. Itunno iti 3.5 oras.

steps.instruction: Remove foil. Blast 230°C for 15 mins to crackle the skin.
steps.instruction_tl: Alisin ang foil. Painitin ng 230°C sa 15 minuto para kumrakle ang balat.
steps.instruction_il: Ikkaten ti foil. Pataken iti 230°C iti 15 minuto tapno agkrokro ti kudil.

steps.instruction: Rest 20 mins. Pull or slice. Skim fat from pan, spoon juices over meat. Serve with potatoes or buns.
steps.instruction_tl: Pahingahin ng 20 minuto. Punitin o hiwain. Tanggalin ang taba, buhusan ng sarsa ang karne. Ihain na may patatas o buns.
steps.instruction_il: Paginanaen iti 20 minuto. Gus-gusoen wenno iwa-iwaen. Ikkaten ti taba, karaman ti sarsa iti karne. Idasar a kadua ti patatas wenno buns.

steps.instruction: Crush Szechuan peppercorns and black peppercorns in a mortar until medium-fine — you want texture, not powder.
Slice squid tubes into rings. Coat with flaky salt and the crushed pepper mixture.
Mix plain flour and cornflour together on a flat plate.
Beat the egg in a bowl. Toss squid rings in the egg to coat.
Coat squid rings in the flour mix in batches. Shake off any excess and place on a tray so they don't stick together.
Heat oil to 180°C. Fry in four batches for about 3 minutes until golden and crispy. Drain on a rack.
In a hot pan, add olive oil and garlic. Once it sizzles, toss in the fried squid and parsley. Toss for 30 seconds.
Serve immediately with lemon wedges.
Peel and chop onion. Peel garlic cloves. Wash and chop leek.
Heat olive oil in a heavy pot over medium heat. Add onion, leek and dried thyme. Sweat gently — do not brown. Add garlic and turn to low. Cook gently for 15 minutes.
Peel and dice potatoes. Add to the pot with all the chicken stock. Season with salt and pepper. Simmer gently for 25–30 minutes.
Add cream and blend completely smooth using a stick blender or regular blender. Taste and adjust seasoning.
For croutons, dice bread and fry in olive oil on low heat until brown and crispy — slow frying keeps them crispy in the soup.
Serve soup in bowls with croutons and chopped parsley on top.

name: Sheet Pan Greek Chicken
name_tl: Greek na Manok sa Sheet Pan
name_il: Manok a Greek iti Sheet Pan

steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 220°C with your biggest tray inside — it should be very hot before the food goes in.
Zest and juice both lemons. Whisk with olive oil, garlic, oregano, Dijon, smoked paprika, salt and pepper to make the dressing. Keep one-third aside for the vegetables.
Toss only the chicken and potatoes in two-thirds of the dressing. Arrange on the hot tray, chicken skin-side up and potatoes cut-side down. Bake 20–25 minutes until potatoes have browned edges.
While that roasts, toss the red onion, capsicum, broccoli, cherry tomatoes and olives in the remaining dressing.
Remove tray from oven. Scatter the vegetables into the gaps around the chicken. Return to oven for 30–35 more minutes until chicken is golden and reaches 75°C inside.
Remove from oven. Scatter feta over everything while still hot. Finish with parsley and dill before serving.

name: Red Lentil Soup with Garlic Sourdough Croutons
name_tl: Sopas ng Pulang Lentil na may Croutons
name_il: Sopas ti Nalabbaga nga Lentil ken Croutons

steps.instruction: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onion and cook until soft and lightly golden, about 6 minutes.
Add cumin and black pepper. Stir for 20 seconds until fragrant.
Add grated carrot and potato. Stir for 1 minute to coat in spices.
Add rinsed lentils and stock. Season with salt. Bring to a boil, then reduce to a gentle simmer for 18–20 minutes until lentils are very soft.
For croutons: cube sourdough and fry in olive oil over medium heat until golden, 3–4 minutes. In the last 10 seconds, add minced garlic and toss through.
Blend soup completely smooth. Stir in sumac. Taste and adjust seasoning.
Serve in bowls topped with parsley, garlic croutons, a sprinkle of sumac and lemon halves to squeeze over.

ingredients.item: Dutch cream or Yukon Gold potatoes medium

steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 220°C. Rub potatoes with olive oil and salt. Prick each potato a few times. Bake 55–65 minutes turning once until skins are dry and completely soft inside — a knife should slide in with zero resistance.
Cool 10–15 minutes. Slice off the top ¼ inch (save the skin to snack on). Scoop out flesh leaving a ¼ inch shell all around.
Pass potato flesh through a ricer into a saucepan. Do NOT use a blender.
Over medium-low heat, stir potato purée with butter, cream, salt, pepper and a little nutmeg until silky and smooth. Remove from heat and fold in chives. Taste — it should already be delicious.
In a small bowl mix the remaining cream, egg yolks, Gruyère, pepper and nutmeg into a loose savoury custard.
Spoon purée back into potato shells, mounding slightly. Use the back of a spoon to create a shallow channel down the centre. Carefully spoon the custard into the channel.
Bake at 180°C for 12–15 minutes until custard is just set and lightly golden. If not browned, grill briefly for 1–2 minutes — watch closely.

name: Spiced Indian Roast Potatoes
name_tl: Inihaw na Patatas na may Pampalasa ng India

steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 200°C. Place an empty roasting tray in the oven to preheat.
Boil potatoes in water with salt, turmeric and baking soda for 10 minutes until just tender. Drain in a colander and toss to roughen the edges. Sprinkle with cornstarch and toss again.

Heat oil in a small saucepan over medium heat. Add garlic and chili, fry until light golden. Add cumin and mustard seeds and let them crackle. Strain the oil into a bowl — keep the crispy garlic and spices aside.
Pour the spiced oil onto the hot roasting tray. Spread potatoes in a single layer and toss to coat. Roast 40 minutes, turning twice for even browning.
Once golden and crisp, remove from oven. Melt butter over the hot potatoes, drizzle with lemon juice, and season. Add the reserved crispy garlic and spices, then finish with mint and coriander.
Preheat oven to 180°C.
Combine cream, milk, nutmeg, salt and pepper in a jug.
Add minced garlic to a large saucepan and pour in the milk and cream mixture. Warm gently.
Peel and slice potatoes about 2mm thick using a mandoline or sharp knife. Add slices directly to the warm cream — do not rinse, the starch thickens the sauce.
Bring to a gentle simmer, stirring so the bottom doesn't catch. Simmer 8 minutes until just tender. Taste and adjust seasoning.
Transfer half the potatoes to a baking dish. Scatter thyme and a handful of cheese. Add remaining potatoes in a neat top layer. Pour over remaining liquid. Top with remaining cheese.
Cover loosely with foil. Bake 40 minutes. Remove foil and bake uncovered 25–30 more minutes until bubbling, golden and a knife slides through easily.
Rest covered with foil and a kitchen towel for 60 minutes — the cream sets and layers hold together. Potatoes stay hot.
Combine olive oil, harissa, hot honey, smoked paprika, lemon juice and salt. Add shrimp, toss to coat, and marinate 10–15 minutes.
For tabbouleh: mix lemon juice, olive oil, sumac and salt. Add bulgur, parsley, tomatoes, cucumber and red onion. Toss and set aside.
For tahini sauce: whisk tahini, lemon juice, cold water, garlic and cumin until smooth. Add more water if needed for drizzling consistency.
Heat a frying pan over medium-high. Cook shrimp 1–2 minutes per side until just opaque and lightly charred.
Warm flatbreads in a dry pan. Spread with tahini sauce, top with tabbouleh, then shrimp, thin cucumber slices and fresh dill.

name: Spanish Garlic Shrimp
name_il: Hipon ti Espanya nga adda Ahos

steps.instruction: In a frying pan over low heat, add olive oil with garlic slices and chili. Stew gently for 2 minutes until fragrant — do not brown the garlic or it turns bitter.
Add prawns in a single layer. Sprinkle with salt and smoked paprika. Cook 1–2 minutes each side until just opaque.
Add lemon juice and parsley. Toss and remove from heat immediately.
Serve sizzling hot straight from the pan with crusty bread for dunking.

name: Roasted Carrot and Ginger Soup
name_tl: Sopas ng Inihaw na Karot at Luya
name_il: Sopas ti Natuno nga Karot ken Laya

steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 200°C. Place carrots, onion and unpeeled garlic on a roasting tray. Drizzle with olive oil, season with salt and roast 25–30 minutes until tender and lightly caramelised.
Squeeze roasted garlic from its skin. Transfer all roasted vegetables to a large soup pot. Add ginger, turmeric, cumin, coriander, paprika, nutmeg and bay leaf.
Pour in stock and simmer gently for 25–30 minutes. Remove the bay leaf.
Blend until smooth and silky. Return to low heat and stir in coconut milk. Adjust seasoning. Add lemon juice for freshness if desired.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh coriander or parsley.
Make the dressing: crush garlic and anchovies to a paste. Add lemon juice, both vinegars, oregano and olive oil. Whisk well.
Boil potatoes in salted water until tender. Cool and peel.
Add 4 tablespoons of dressing to a large bowl. Add tomatoes, grated carrot, halved artichoke hearts, rocket and tuna. Slice potatoes and add them. Toss well.
Top with torn mozzarella, olives, a drizzle of olive oil and freshly torn basil. Serve with optional anchovies on the side.

name: Pan Seared Salmon with Lemon Butter Cream Sauce
name_tl: Piniritong Salmon na may Sarsa ng Limon at Mantikilya
name_il: Pinirito nga Salmon nga adda Sarsa ti Limon ken Mantikilia

steps.instruction: Remove skin from salmon if desired. Finely chop shallots and parsley leaves.
Melt butter in a frying pan over medium heat. Place salmon top-side down and cook until lightly golden. Flip gently and cook until butter turns nutty brown.
Deglaze with white wine, add lemon juice and shallots. Add cream. Season. Poach the fish in the sauce for about 3 minutes until cooked to your liking.
Remove salmon carefully and place on a warm plate. Reduce the sauce on high heat until thickened. Stir in parsley and pour over the fish.
Heat oil in a large wok or frying pan over medium-high heat. Add chicken cubes and stir-fry 5–7 minutes until cooked through.
Add onion, white spring onion parts, garlic and ginger. Cook 1–2 minutes until fragrant.
Add capsicums, carrots and broccoli. Stir-fry 4–5 minutes until tender-crisp. Add a splash of water if needed to steam through.
Return chicken to pan. Add oyster sauce, soy sauce and chili sauce. Mix, then add cornstarch slurry (cornstarch + water). Cook 2–3 minutes until glossy.
Finish with sesame oil. Serve over rice or noodles. Garnish with spring onion greens and sesame seeds.

name: Italian Chicken Stuffed Peppers
name_tl: Pinalamanan ng Manok na Bell Pepper
name_il: Bell Pepper nga Napnuan iti Manok

ingredients.item: large bell peppers red or yellow

steps.instruction: Preheat oven to 180°C. Heat olive oil and butter in a large frying pan over medium heat. Add onion with a pinch of salt and cook until soft.
Add garlic and oregano. Add tomato paste and cook 1–2 minutes. Add chicken mince and break up, cooking until done with light browning.
Pour in passata. Simmer uncovered 12–15 minutes until thick. Remove from heat and stir in rice, Parmesan and parsley. Taste and adjust seasoning.
Cut peppers in half lengthwise through the stem. Remove seeds and ribs. Season inside with salt and pepper.
Spoon filling into pepper halves. Top with grated mozzarella. Pour 3 tbsp water into the baking dish base. Cover tightly with foil and bake 20 minutes.
Remove foil and bake uncovered 10–15 more minutes until peppers are tender and cheese is melted and golden.
Grate potatoes finely. Hand-squeeze out as much liquid as possible and place in a bowl.
Add finely sliced onion, crushed garlic, thyme, rosemary. Season with salt and pepper. Mix well.

Melt clarified butter. Heat a heavy-bottomed pan over medium heat with the butter. Divide potato mixture into four portions. Press gently into the pan. Turn to low and cook 10–12 minutes until golden brown on the underside.
Flip and cook the other side 10–12 minutes until golden.
Cook bacon in a dry pan until crispy. Slice spring onions.
Plate rosti topped with goat yogurt, crispy bacon and spring onion.
Mix soft butter with minced garlic and chopped parsley to make garlic butter.
Flatten chicken thighs. Grill in a pan with olive oil, salt and pepper until cooked through.

Spread garlic butter on one side of each bread slice. Spread cream cheese on the other side. Layer Gruyère, cooked chicken pieces and more Gruyère. Top with second bread slice, garlic butter side out.
Place sandwiches garlic-butter-side down in a large frying pan on low heat under a lid. Grill until golden, 3–4 minutes per side. Flip and cook the other side.
Cut into triangles and serve hot.

name: Steamed Fish with Lemon Beurre Blanc
name_tl: Nilagang Isda na may Sarsa ng Limon at Mantikilya
name_il: Nabukbok nga Ikan nga adda Sarsa ti Limon ken Mantikilia

steps.instruction: Season fish with salt, pepper and a drizzle of olive oil.
Fill a pot with 2 inches of water and bring to a simmer. Position a steaming basket above the water. Place fish in the basket. Cover and steam 8–10 minutes until opaque and flaking.
While fish steams, combine white wine, lemon juice and shallots in a small saucepan. Simmer until reduced by half.
Reduce heat to low. Whisk in chilled butter cubes one at a time, whisking constantly to emulsify the sauce. Do not let it boil.
Stir in capers and dill. Season to taste. Spoon sauce generously over steamed fish. Serve immediately.
